heading: Industrial Automation
content: We have proven experience with custom industrial control systems, motor controllers, robotic payloads, sensors, communication systems, and human machine interfaces.

heading: Firmware Development
content: We can set up a full development environment from the ground up to meet your development and deployment needs, specializing in embedded systems and Zephyr RTOS.

heading: Electrical Systems Design
content: We can help you design, test, and manufacture an individual component or an entire system, including PCB design and electrical system architecture.
